project: Restore LiveDrafts Editor & Code Block Features
context: Editor JS (3369 lines) and CSS (703 lines) survived the git mishap but were never wired into the site. Created bootstrap HTML, server-side API, Prism.js integration, Edit buttons, and combined dev server.

tasks.name: Add Prism.js library to the repo
tasks.details: Downloaded prism-core.min.js, prism-autoloader.min.js, prism-okaidia.css, prism-light.css to media/js/prism/

tasks.name: Create editor API server script
tasks.details: Created scripts/dev-editor-server.py with 4 endpoints: load-draft, save, upload, fetch-meta. All tested and working.

tasks.name: Create editor bootstrap HTML page
tasks.details: Created scripts/generate_editor_page.py. Generates /editor/index.html with contentEditable surface, toolbar (Save/Publish/CopyOrg/Undo/Redo), Prism + draft-editor.js, auto-load from ?slug=X query param.

tasks.name: Wire editor assets into publish.sh
tasks.details: publish.sh now copies media/css/ to public/media/css/, generates /editor/index.html.

tasks.name: Update dev server to handle API routes
tasks.details: dev-web.sh now uses dev-editor-server.py (combined static + API). Falls back to python -m http.server if script missing.

tasks.name: Add Edit button to draft preview pages
tasks.details: build_draft_previews.py injects Edit button in DRAFT banner linking to /editor/?slug=X&kind=draft

tasks.name: Add Edit button to drafts listing page
tasks.details: generate_drafts.py adds Edit link overlay on each draft card thumbnail

tasks.name: Add 'New Draft' button to drafts listing
tasks.details: generate_drafts.py adds New Draft button (teal #36c9c7) linking to /editor/

tasks.name: Add Editor link to site navigation
tasks.details: Added to AOG theme nav.mustache between Drafts and Nano Chat

tasks.name: Create lightweight code block enhancer script
tasks.details: Enhance static <pre> blocks on published articles with language badge, copy button, theme toggle — without the full editor.

tasks.name: API endpoint tests
tasks.details: Tested load-draft, save (roundtrip), static file serving, editor page, Prism/JS serving — all 10 tests passed.

tasks.name: HTML↔Org roundtrip
tasks.details: Save→Load roundtrip tested: title, body, tags all preserved correctly.

tasks.name: Existing features regression
tasks.details: Drafts listing, draft previews, series nav, published articles, search index — all verified working.
